name: @krllc/calamine-wasm
description: calamine (Rust xlsx reader) compiled to WebAssembly, with a streaming worker-first client for Node.js and browsers

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/wasm --release --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/calamine-wasm/pkg/node --out-name calamine_wasm && wasm-pack build ../../crates/wasm --release --target web --out-dir ../../packages/calamine-wasm/pkg/web --out-name calamine_wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:client
